ddls:
CREATE TABLE "birth_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each birth record */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual (M/F) */,
  "births" INTEGER /* Number of births recorded for that name in the specific year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the birth record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the births were recorded */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the individuals */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., census, hospital records) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_records_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_records_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name associated with the trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend record */,
  "popularity_index" REAL /* Calculated popularity index based on birth counts over time */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the trend is observed */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the trend record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the trend record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_trends_name FOREIGN KEY ("name") REFERENCES birth_records ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for gender */,
  "gender_type" TEXT /* Type of gender (M/F) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gender record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gender record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which births were recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year (e.g., significant historical events) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the year record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the year record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES birth_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_synonyms" (
  "synonym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synonym record */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name for which synonyms exist */,
  "synonym" TEXT /* Synonym or variation of the name */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the synonym data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the synonym record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the synonym record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synonym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_synonyms_name FOREIGN KEY ("name") REFERENCES birth_records ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "birth_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the statistics */,
  "total_births" INTEGER /* Total number of births recorded in that year */,
  "female_births" INTEGER /* Number of female births */,
  "male_births" INTEGER /* Number of male births */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the statistics are recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the statistics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the statistics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the statistics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_statistics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name being analyzed */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend observed (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the analysis */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the analysis is focused */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analysis data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analysis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analysis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_analysis_name FOREIGN KEY ("name") REFERENCES birth_records ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_analysis_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the birth record that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the record */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to make the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version control record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES birth_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
